case_title: TANA GRIFFIN VS. SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TANA GRIFFIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VANCE YOSHIDA, ROSE ROBINSON, KENNEDY NGUYEN WHO ALL WAIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT MT. EDEN FLORAL COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROBERT SHIBATA AND ALEX SHIBATA. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART IS DIISMISSED BY THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, TANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MT. EDEN FLORAL COMPANY LLC $3,219.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,219.20, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MT. EDEN FLORAL COMPANY LLC
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GRIFFIN, TANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRIFFIN, TANA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FLOWER MART LLC MT. EDEN FLORAL COMPANY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
